onset.Description: the onset time of the event

duration.Description: not used, see stimduration and soaduration

stimnumber.Description: ID number of the stimulus concept that was shown

istraget.Description: was this stimulus presentation a target? 0 = no, 1 = yes

response.Description: did the participant respond? 0 = no, 1 = yes

rt.Description: if the participant responded, this is the response time relative to the target onset (in sec). If no response, this will be 0.

correct.Description: was the response correct? 1 = correct, 0 = incorrect/no response

time_stimon.Description: time the stimulus came on the screen (psychopy time relative to experiment start)

time_stimoff.Description: time the stimulus was removed from the screen (psychopy time relative to experiment start)
